question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?

decomposed_queries: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?

retrieval_top.candidate_question: Which trials satisfy Name of ICI = Atezolizumab AND Cancer type = Colorectal AND Control arm = Multikinase inhibitor?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';

retrieval_top.candidate_question: Which trials have Control arm equal to Multikinase inhibitor?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';

retrieval_top.candidate_question: What trials are for Colorectal cancer?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
